entry.title: Unable to trigger the iflow in SAP CPI free trail account
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I am learning SAP CPI by doing some POCs in SAP CPI free trail account while doing POCs unable to trigger the Iflow through postman and I gave all the correct configuration detail and also selected basic auth in postman and I gave correct credential still I am getting 401 unauthorization error.

Please let me know where I went wrong and what might be the reason for getting this 401 unauthorization error.

For SAP CPI free trail account are there any limitations ? I gave all the correct user roles. 

Regards,

Gopi

entry.title: Re: Preview/Download Fragmented Forms from Fiori List Report (Part -2)
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I would like to implement your solution on SAP Public Cloud, but I guess it's not possible as the use of class cl_somu_form_services is not permitted.

Do you know any alternative? It's really feasible to develop something similar on Public edition?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA FUNDS MANAGEMENT-Part 2 (what’s in it for private owned Customers)
entry.content:
Ciao @marco_redaelli 

THis is a typical problem: 

Regarding the PO position dates in which the budget is being consumed, usually customers asks to have the Delivery date as option for budget commitment consumption. There is some customizing in the exceptions to the update profile to decide which date (delivery date, posting date or due date) to use for PO commitments. 

So if customer decides to have delivery or due date he may have commitments in future years. Then he need to choose what to do:

  1. if he wants to manage Budget availability control for several years he will need to put the annual budget for several years.
  2. If he doesn't, he will need to live with possible  not checked  commitments  in the following years. 

Depending on this choice (alternative numbers are related to previous list):

  1. At the end of the year he may want to decide what to do with yearly not consumed budget and open commitments (carryforward is an option) 
  2. When he starts the budget process for the following years, put the budget and rebuild the commitments in order to give  the idea of a proper budget consumption.

I hope i clarified a bit. 

Best 

GIanluca

entry.title: Re: Error Message: Please fill in an email template
entry.content: What if we want to process output without form templates?

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher does not start after Refresh database
entry.content:
furthermore maybe you can check and post the output of the following (sidadm user)

hdbsql -U DEFAULT

and

R3trans -d

br

entry.title: Can i purchase More sap b1 licenses if im not paying amc for previous years
entry.content:
As per the subject states can I purchase further licenses, as we've not been paying amc for the last 3-4 years?

Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: Re: I want to understand how the Batch Job change logs can be pulled from SAP .
entry.content:
Hello,

The job SAP_REORG_JOBS delete all the history of your job

the job SAP_REORG_SPOOL delete all the history of your spool

if you want to change the parameter of the job (Retentiontime e.g.) you need to go to program RSBTCDEL

 

your joblogs should be kept under /sapmnt/<SID>/global

 

br

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
entry.content:
Hello,

 

it seems one buffer is not sufficient in your system (check st02) . Mostly it is the heap memory. you can adjust it with restart or on the fly with the following report RSMEMORY

 

br

entry.title: Re: SQL Caught Rabax
Re: Can we populate (automatic) or default text whencreate a sales invoice
entry.content: You need to copy Text ID & Text Object from SO10 & maintain at Access Sequence for Text ID's.

Glad that it worked for you and you are correct you need to have a service key to connect ADT > SAP BTP - BAS.

Thanks. Let us know if there is anything that we can support. 

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: Re: business partner - address type / address usage configurable?
entry.content: Do we have any solution to Adding Payers addresses in BP- Address Overview tab - Address Usages.

entry.title: Product Updates for SAP Build Code – July 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

In our continuous efforts to enhance your application development experience, we're thrilled to introduce several new SAP Build Code features. Let me share with you some highlights of the latest releases.

 

Generative AI support for productivity tool

In SAP Build Code, our generative AI assistant Joule supports you with many developer tasks including generating data models and services, the application logic, and unit testing. We now allow you to use Joule where you need it: inside our productivity tools. You will find the little Joule icon is displayed besides the title of the Data Models and the Services tiles in the Storyboard. Opening Joule, you will see it supports you based on your current context. This means, when you are starting to create, for example, the data model Joule opens for exactly this purpose. You get an inline area, in which you can type your prompt. In addition, you will find a list of suggested prompts.

Joule icon in the data models and services tiles

Suggested prompts

 

Use Joule to enhance your already existing data models and services 

We got the request to allow developers to use Joule to modify their already generated SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) data model or service entities. I’m happy to tell you that it is now possible to modify either the data model (schema.cds) or the service entities (service.cds), or both, using a prompt, and get the enhanced cds content.

With this new feature, it is now possible to:

  • add or remove an entity,
  • add, modify, or remove properties of entities,
  • create or remove associations between entities,
  • get more support on the service projection definition.

Step 1: Create your data model and services with the help of Joule

Step 2: Use Joule to enhance your data model

Result: Enhanced data model

Please read the documentation for further information about Generative AI-Powered Development in SAP Build Code.

 

Guided development for SAP Fiori app development

With SAP Fiori elements you can build your applications according to your specific requirements. It is one of the options available to develop SAP Fiori apps based on SAPUI5. In the guide center panel of your SAP Fiori Application project, you can now find an embedded tutorial for SAP Fiori app development. This tutorial describes step by step how to develop a custom page based on the flexible programming model.

Tutorial: Develop an SAP Fiori app on BTP

 

Graphical editor for hdbgrants files

When working with HDI hdbgrants files are used to define the permissions and access rights for users and roles within an HDI container in the SAP HANA database. In SAP Business Application Studio, the SAP HANA tools offer a graphical editor for hdbgrants files providing a convenient way of implementing cross-container or cross-schema scenarios. The syntax of hdbgrants files can be quite complex, hence this graphical editor can ease the development of such scenarios. Note that it is also possible to use the code editor or to toggle between code and graphical editor, depending on your personal preferences.

Graphical editor for hdbgrants files

The source of the privileges is a service instance containing information that can be used to grant privileges in the database. The editor lists the available service instances that are bound to the current project. A user can select which service instance should be used for the current file.

Privileges in hdbgrants files can be specified for two users: the HDI container’s object owner and the application user that is used by the application to connect to the database at runtime. The two tabs at the top of the editor allow selecting either user.

Individual privileges can be assigned on the available object types: global roles, schema-local roles, system privileges, schema privileges, object privileges, and global object privileges. The privileges can be granted either with grant option or without grant option. Grants with grant option are required for building database objects on top of other database objects. Since database objects in an HDI container should only be created by HDI (by means of the object owner user) the object owner should usually be granted privileges with grant option, while the application user only needs to perform DML operations on database objects and does not need the privileges with grant option.

For an easy way of keeping the privileges of the object owner and the application user in sync the editor allows copying the current privileges of the object owner to the application user via the “Copy properties to application user” button. When using this convenience feature all privileges that the object owner has with grant option are copied to the application user without grant option in order to set up the recommended permission model.

 

Further readings

You are still using SAP Business Application Studio and want to know, why you should change to SAP Build Code? Then I recommend reading this blog post written by my colleague Rupa Maity:  Why SAP Build Code? Read this blog post written by my colleague Marc Huber to find out how to migrate content from SAP Business Application Studio to SAP Build Code.

In addition, I want to draw you attention to two other great blog posts:

Collaborate on your SAP Build Code project with your teammates! written by Rupa Maity

How to Develop SAP MDK Applications in SAP Build Code written by Liat Borenstein

 

For further information on new features, please check our roadmaps: roadmap for SAP Build Code, SAPUI5 Road Map. And have a look at What's New in SAP Build Code, the What's New Viewer for SAPUI5 and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Release Notes. If you want to stay up-to-date with news, learning resources, and product and strategy updates for SAP Build Code: follow our tag.

We look forward to seeing how you use these new capabilities to create innovative solutions and drive your projects forward. Stay tuned for more updates and happy coding! 😊

entry.title: SAP Joule useful links Compilation
entry.content:
OK, SAP Joule is here. Finally during this April 2024 we have received the news that the European data center for Joule is finally available. 

Below are the links I found useful during the implementation.

SAP HELP links

  • SAP help with the onboarding procedure 
    https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/serviceguide/what-is-joule
  • SAP help with a a list of capabilities that are available for Joule
    https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/capabilities-guide/about-this-document
  • Data Center Mapping between SAP SuccessFactors and Joule
    https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/serviceguide/data-center-mapping-between-sap-successfactors-and-joule
  • Joule Functionalities available on SAP SuccessFactors
    https://help.sap.com/docs/joule/capabilities-guide/transactional-use-cases

9d8c0ef2443b49f993a27de8f38f83af.pdf (sap.com)

 

SAP Community

  • Community Page on Joule (marketing videos, day-to-day, etc)
    https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/joule
  • Amazing blog with implementation step by step from @nageshcaparthy 
    https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-onboarding-series-joule-getting-started-with-joule-and-sap/ba-p/13575477
  • Common Issues from @nageshcaparthy 
    https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-onboarding-series-joule-with-sfsf-common-setup-issues/ba-p/13650311

 

  • Joule FAQ Document
    https://dam.sap.com/mac/u/a/2cfR5tj.htm?rc=10
  • SAP BTP Onboarding team
    sap_btp_onboarding@sap.com


Issue Solvers

Reach out to Support

If you encounter an issue with Joule, it's possible to report an incident or error through the SAP for me. For more information, see Getting Support remember:
When submitting the incident, include the following information:

  • Region information (EU10, US10, for example)
  • Subaccount ID
  • The steps used to replicate the error
  • Screenshots and network trace

Do it into the component name: CA-JOULE

Others

  • Common Issues from @nageshcaparthy 
    https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-onboarding-series-joule-with-sfsf-common-setup-issues/ba-p/13650311

entry.title: Can't found app "Manage Production Supply Areas"
entry.content:
Hello experts, We encountered an issue in scope item 3DV during the preliminary step where we need to create a Control Cycle. To create the Control Cycle, we must input a Supply Area, but it is not available on our test system. We wanted to create Supply area but we were unable to find the app „Manage Production Supply Area“.

The prerequisite for this step is “Maintain production Supply Area - MDS (3KS)” from the Warehouse Management Setup Guide.docx (Public).

When we open the 3KS his Business condition we can see that prerequisite is 40D that is used for creating Supply area. Create Warehouse Master Data for Production Supply (3KS) 

 

And when we open 40D to Create Production Supply area there is mention of APP “Manage production Supply Area” but we can’t find the app on our system. Create Production Supply Area (40D) | SAP Help Portal

Although we found a note about hidden applications in the SAP Fiori launchpad, we still haven’t located the desired application.

Could you please assist us in finding the Manage Production Supply Areas app so that we can proceed with creating the Supply Area? Thank you in advance for your help. Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Partner tab in Manage Purchase Order (F0842A) Fiori App with the 2023 release upgrade
entry.content: No its not working in my case any other alternative to enable partner tab?

entry.title: Re: S4HC - Consume Local events

@vkesarir,

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/consume-an-event-using-event-consumption-model/ba-p/13537871 

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: Re: RAP directly navigate to List or next position after saving Objectpage
entry.content:
Hi ipt_mka,
it should be possible to combine the onAfterSave Controller Extension (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.fe.core.controllerextensions.EditFlow%23methods/onAfterSave) with UI5s routing or the equivalent on Fe side (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.fe.core.controllerextensions.Routing).
Best regards,
Julian

Thanks for your question. Are you looking for Factory or Holiday Calendar info to be extracted ? 

If that is the case, then you can extract the info from the CDS view by configuring custom ODATA API. Hope this helps. 

https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_FACTORYCALENDARVALUEHELP

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: Where can I learn how to increase configured posting rules’ and ‘automated reprocessing rules’?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Managing Cash Application for FI-CA learning journey

Overview
This learning journey provides an overview of the SAP Cash Application, add-on for Financial Contract Accounting (FI-CA).

The training gives an overview of the processes, the AI process automation capabilities as well as an insight in the configuration needed to use the solution.
It will also show the main differences between the SAP Cash Application for FI-CA and Financial Accounts Receivable (FI-AR).

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to:

  • Identify the challenges of a Digital Economy
  • Understand the Cash Application Process and why it is needed
  • Describe the Cash Application Training Process
  • Configure the Cash Application
  • Execute the Cash Application Processes ​
  • Describe the differences between the Cash App for FI-CA and FI-AR

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! 
We are here to support you. I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Hello all, I am new here in this community. My goal is to learn SAP with hopes of being a consul
entry.content:
Hi @Ayomide
Please note that we will not allow members to post certification- or knowledge badge questions in our group, nor that our subject matter exerts will answerer these questions.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Create DataType and Message Type artifact in Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Sui
entry.content:
Hello @radhika_javvaji ,

First of all, I would like to thank you for introducing this feature, I have already utilized this functionality, and it is indeed very helpful.

However, I have encountered an issue where the target application has modified the structure, and I need to delete a field from the DataType. Unfortunately, I only see an option to add fields in the DataType Editor and have not found a way to remove them. Additionally, I hoped to directly manipulate the XSD, but this does not seem possible either.

Am I possibly missing something, or are these functions not yet available? If they are not available, could you please let me know when we might expect to use these features?

Thank you for your assistance.
Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: hdbcli.dbapi.Error: (10, "authentication failed:.. while connecting HANA Cloud with local python prg
entry.content:
Hi everyone, so today I created a HANA Cloud database and already configured it so it Allows all IP Addresses; then I want to try to connect to that database directly from my local Python program using hdbcli. Here is the code that I use to connect:

import os
from flask import Flask
from cfenv import AppEnv
from hdbcli import dbapi

app = Flask(__name__)
env = AppEnv()

# hana_service = None
# hana = env.get_service(label=hana_service)

port = int(os.environ.get('PORT', 3000))
@app.route('/')
def hello():
    conn = dbapi.connect(address='8ec92110-...-...-...-.hana.trial-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com',
                            port=443,
                            user='HANAUSER',
                            password='UserHanaPass.99',
                            encrypt=True,
                            sslValidateCertificate=False
                            )

    cursor = conn.cursor()
    cursor.execute("select CURRENT_UTCTIMESTAMP from DUMMY")
    ro = cursor.fetchone()
    cursor.close()
    conn.close()

    return "Current time is: " + str(ro["CURRENT_UTCTIMESTAMP"])

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=port)

this is the full error message:

  File "D:\Cognitus\IFRS\1.IFRS 9 Concept\Code\.venv\lib\site-packages\flask\app.py", line 865, in dispatch_request
    return self.ensure_sync(self.view_functions[rule.endpoint])(**view_args)  # type: ignore[no-any-return]  
  File "d:\Cognitus\IFRS\1.IFRS 9 Concept\Code\server_direct.py", line 15, in hello
    conn = dbapi.connect(address='8ec92110-7253-4e50-9c4a-05a53ab55162.hana.trial-us10.hanacloud.ondemand.com',
hdbcli.dbapi.Error: (10, "authentication failed: Detailed info for this error can be found with correlation ID '0BB7FCD761027446922C598C547781DC'")so what i missed here? thanks!

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @Juergen_Mechler, 

Thanks for the feedback. You can find the files in my next blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-btp-onboarding-series-joule-with-sfsf-common-setup-issues/ba-p/13650311 and #10 for quick setup. 

The files are attached to the bottom of the blog. 

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: Deploy SAP BTP application with Front and Backend Service together
entry.content:
I would like to create a demo application

1) SAP UI5 application to manage ToDo's
2) Create a service that allow CRUD operations
3) Create Hana DB to store data.

I created a separate application for UI and DB Service, both are working fine. Can both project is in single project and deploy only in 1 place?

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Page + Can I remove the header of a page or c...
entry.content:
Hi

I was looking to implement the same thing. I know it is an old post, so just adding what I implemented as it might help someone else. Although, I am not sure if this is the recommended way. I ended up implementing an extension. In the method view(), I added this code this.page().actionBarHidden = true.

In addition to above, in my  navigation action I set ModalPageFullScreen and ModalPage as true. This works for the scenario I am implementing.

After configuring and transporting my request my My Inbox is still empty.
Can anyone help me?

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series] Joule – Getting Started with Joule and SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Customer integrated Joule GenAI co-pilot with SF.  For that they signed no-cost SAP Joule SKU and he would like to know pricing structure for additional messages beyond the initial no-cost SAP Joule SKU.

But as per the cloud service specification document

 

SAP AI Services List  it seems there is a limit on the maximum number of free messages as in the table below and additional messages will add cost.

 

 

After this, It seems10 000 messages costs the price 7 capacity unit

Could you please confirm if my understanding is accurate? Additionally, I would appreciate guidance on how customers can monitor their message consumption and be alerted when approaching the threshold. Any materials or documents are appreciated

entry.title: System Migration - Oracle 12.2 to Orqcel 19c
entry.content:
hello Team,

we are migrating from Vendor DC to Azure. 

Source - Windows 2012R2/Oracle 12.2
Target - Windows 2022 / Oracle 19.c

Option 1-
Install Oracle 12.2 on Windows 2022, take a rman online backup from source and restore on target. Upgrade target Oracle from 12.2. to 19c before releasing the system to users.

Option 2 :- 
Install Windows 2012/Oracle 12.2 and then in-place upgrade to Windows 2022/Oracle 19c.

Question is which option is supported by SAP . 
for QA system we performed export/import using SWPM.
we considering above options as SWPM exp/imp is taking longer duration and as its critical system business is not allowing longer downtime.

Also, can you please share the archive link for Oracle 12.2 version...

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: System Migration - Oracle 12.2 to Orqcel 19c
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

SAP supports the system copy via SWPM.

Windows server 2022 is only supported as of Oracle 19c, so option 1 is not possible.

I would suggest to install Oracle 12.2 on windows 2012 and then do a heterogenous SWPM system copy with database upgrade to 19c.

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Create SAPUI5 multiple layout application
entry.content:
Here is my requirement.

Home Page - Single Page which shows tiles(Modules) or dashboard with graphs.

On click on Module- It will show a split with 2 section left and right.

If we click on graph or chart - It will show a single page with detail. and on click on detail it will show a split window under the same page.

Is it possible to do this, please guide, I used all the useful components from UI5 kit but nothings works.

I choose split app and unable to create intermediate page with single page.

entry.title: Re: hdbcli.dbapi.Error: (10, "authentication failed:.. wh...
entry.content:
You need to log on to your instance with the DBADMIN user and check what the full error message is for the correlation-id `0BB7FCD761027446922C598C547781DC` by running the query:

SELECT * FROM SYS.AUTHENTICATION_ERROR_DETAILS 
WHERE CORRELATION_ID = '0BB7FCD761027446922C598C547781DC';

 Regards,
--Vitaliy

entry.title: Pending quantities for services purchase order (without MIGO entering)
entry.content:
Hi All!

I am trying to understand why SAP (S/4 HANA 1909) is calculating pending quantities to services Purchase Orders (PO) in ME21N...

We use the DIEN material type to services here.

The field 

Is there any configuration to make on the system to avoid this calc?

entry.title: Re: Implementing Multiple Risk Classes for Business Partn...
entry.content:
Hi @NezaketHesenova,

This is an interesting requirement. If a customer (company A) has a 'very high' likelihood to default in payments based on publicly accessible data (e.g. financial statements, credit ratings, etc.), what can make company A to have a 'very low' likelihood of defaulting in payments?

Please refer to note 3107840 - How to update risk class in FSCM Credit Management? - SAP for Me for the configuration and further information.

Regards,
Darrel

entry.title: Re: Be Comfortable, Authentic and Interview the Interviewer 🧑🏻‍💻
entry.content: Thanks for sharing these valuable insights

entry.title: Career Change at 38: Is SAP the Right Path?
entry.content:
I'm 38 years old. I have spent a short time in the army and since 2012 I have been driving trucks.

I haven't made the best decisions in life, but I've realised there is one thing I need to sort out ASAP. I need to start enjoying my job.

My initial plan was to create a cross-platform logistics app, but then I stumbled across SAP and my entire outlook has been transformed overnight. I absolutely love it and I'm thinking, this is what I need!

I'm now thinking I need to study the fundamentals and processes, carry out my own investigation into a trucking company and then use SAP to build a tailored package for that company, with a view of getting a job as quickly as possible, which will allow me to spend more time learning SAP.

I'm not expecting it to be good enough to actually incorporate, as it will all be self-taught and my first ever industry experience.

The reason I'm here is to see what actual SAP experts think about what I'm thinking.

Is 38 too late to try and start out with SAP?
Will I need some form of higher education?
Can what I've just said work?
Am I up against it, by not showing my passion for development sooner?
Will there be a huge cost to initially gain access to SAP?
Will I need to be an expert in SAP ABAP and Java before I can land a job?
What are the minimum requirements to get an entry-level job?

I do know that I personally will absolutely love getting involved and expanding my knowledge. I have a genuine passion for business processes and development and at heart I'm naturally steering towards learning SAP initially and then moving onto languages like SAP ABAP and Java in order to take my SAP skills to the next level.

I only found out about SAP 2 days ago, but I strongly feel I need SAP in my life!  I usually study via Udemy, but yesterday I joined Coursera and signed up for a SAP account.

Please, share your thoughts?

entry.title: Re: Directly creating text elements from eclipse
entry.content:
Hi Thomas!
I know this has been already implemented long time ago and works as expected.

However, is there any chance to have a mass creation or updating of (missing, availabel) text elements? I'm missing such a feature for a long time in SAP GUI and would like to see it in ADT.

Slightly OT: Where do I find the extended code checks in ADT, latest available version?

Found 😉 : Blog: Extended Syntax Checks 

Thanks, Michael

entry.title: Re: Cancelamento de pedido de venda aprovado
entry.content: Muito obrigado @giulianosilva. Fiz para pedido de compra e funcionou!

entry.title: Re: Report on Task Checklist
entry.content: I am also interested in the report, could you please share it?

entry.title: Cannot post document: tax base in local currency is zero Message no. FF759
entry.content:
Hello All,

I hope you all are well, when I was releasing my commercial invoice from code VF02 to create accounting entries I got the above error after checking OBYZ I was unable to find the actual reason for that error.

Please help me out. I would appreciate your expertise.

entry.title: Re: TRANSPORTING SELECTION TEXTS
entry.content: not the same issue

entry.title: How to pass error message from read method in behavior implementation class?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement where we need to pass error messages if the data extracted from the CDS view belongs to a certain Sales Organization.
The development is done using RAP framework, data is being extracted from standard tables in interface CDS views which are being used in final consumption view. The application is display only and the whole thing works fine.
But now we have a requirement where we need to show error message instead of data if certain result set is extracted. So can we use read method of behavior implementation class, where we can check the result set and pass the data or error message accordingly?

entry.title: How to create control code in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
How to define new control code in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create control code in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
To define the Control codes, please follow these steps:

1) Ensure you have the business role SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT (Configuration Expert - Business Process Configuration) or a similar role to access the "Manage Your Solution" app.
2) Access the "Manage Your Solution" app.
3) Click on "Configure Your Solution."
4) In the search field, enter the ID 103439.
5) Select "Integration with External Tax Calculation Engines."
6) Find option number 6 "Assign Product Codes to a Country/Region for Tax Calculation" and click on "Configure."

You can now create new entries according to your country's requirements.

entry.title: SAPCodeJam in SAP Inside Track Porto 2024
entry.content:
We announce that SAPCodeJam will be in PORTO, integrating SAP Inside Track PORTO on 27 SEP 2024.

This SAP CodeJam event in PORTO has the subject Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

You'll become acquainted with how embedded Machine Learning in SAP HANA can be used to build ML models. In working through this CodeJam you'll also become familiar with how the SAP Business Application Studio can be used to work with Jupyter notebooks.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, September 27th, in Porto, Portugal 

 

 from 10:00 to 16:00 WEST (UTC+1). The language of the event and the content will be in English. 

The instructor is a Developer Advocate Vitaliy Rudnytskiy.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-ml-py-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

The event is being hosted by SAP Inside Track Porto at
The Lodge Hotel,
Rua Serpa Pinto, 60 4400-307 V. N. Gaia – Porto

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 30 attendees.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: How to search only in a specific community
entry.content:
all question for SQL Anywhere might have the SAP Managed Tag: SAP SQL Anywhere
but entering a search string in the SAP Community all posts are searched independent of the managed tag associated. 
So how to limit the results of a search to show only posts with the SAP Managed Tag: SAP SQL Anywhere

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @Nora88 ,

Thanks for writing! Invite sent via PM.

Are you already using a SAP Supply Chain solution for work?

entry.title: Component scrap
entry.content:
Hi all,

we implemented Operational scrap in a routing and next step is setup Component scrap. We have also assembly scrap on SFG level, which should be overwritten by operational and component scrap.

Operational scrap is working correct, but my question is, if there is possibility to setup component scrap based on quantities in Operations.

Example:

quantity on order is 260, plus assembly scrap = 400

Also operational quantity is calculated correctly, is lower and lower in next step as process proceed

but component quantities are calculated from base quantity when production order was created(260pcs)

is there any possibility that component quantities will be calculated from reduced quantities?

thank you for your advice,

entry.title: Re: Setting up Trial SAP Datasphere Account with Trial SAP SAC Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am getting the below error.

entry.title: Error message: material is not maintained when creating billing doc via VF01
entry.content: I get error message material is not maintained when trying to create billing doc via VF01 in reference to delivery. I checked material master data and compared with another material for the same plants (receiving and shipping), sales org and distribution channel and see no difference. Do you know what might causing the issue?

entry.title: Re: [Brainstorming] Translation Tools for ABAP in Eclipse
entry.content: Any news on that? Or has ADT already been enhanced for adding translations and I did not find the appropriate menu?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA FUNDS MANAGEMENT-Part 2 (what’s in it for private owned Customers)
entry.content:
Hi @derinola27 I am sorry for the late reply 

regading Currency I do not understand what you are asking me

 

Regarding asset please read oss 2405147

Best 

GIanluca

entry.title: Call dates in maintenance plans
entry.content:
Hi all,

could you please explain to me logic of dates in maintenance?

we have an issue that call dates are moving even if we dont make any changes, f. e. maintenance plans should be called on friday and starts on monday next week, but for some reason call date is moved to monday and then the whole plan is changed and moved to next day.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Brokerage charges on customer sales order
entry.content:
Currently for Brokerage we use rebate document which reflects as a credit in AR. Sometimes Brokerage is our existing customer + brokers as well. At times, if the broker is not our customer, the amount released will reflect as credit in AR as one line, with no history of sales on it. Broker will give an invoice to us. Pricing team will raise a PO for this amount and submit the invoice to AP. The amount that was parked to AR earlier (from brokerage agreement) will then be moved to AP GL account.

If AP posting and AR release same month, the amount of AP and AR will net off each other, but if either one side delay in posting, the GL will reflect weird amount (either with positive / negative amount which business has to monitor monthly basis.

Is there a better way to deal with brokerage based on customer sales history?  How do we link the broker commission to sales orders without issuing a rebate credit note.

entry.title: Re: Release Assessment and Scope Dependency Tool(RASD 2.0) Released to Customers
entry.content:
Hello @Asha_Pillai , excellent Blog!

Can you use de RASD for 2SL and 3SL?

Thank you!
Manuel

entry.title: Re: Override back button on FLP
entry.content:
My attempts to capture the browser back event have never been completely successful in the past. 

If you're using the standard draft-handling mechanism, then the user entries should be saved as draft and they can continue later when they enter the object page again. Not sure if that behaviour is acceptable for your use case.

entry.title: SAP Manufacturing Execution training
entry.content:
Hi

 

The VARNISH step only is used if there are scratches. If the MECA part is scratch-free, it goes directly to the CAB step. If the MECA part has scratches it goes to VARNISH step.

I integrated a data collection by selecting the Boolean type in the MECA operation. On the false value I entered “YES” (application of varnish) and the true value “NO”. I assigned it a NC_CODE “DEFAUT_ASPECT”

I tried to attach nonconformance scripts to any branch but if I confirm “yes” or “no”, the system sends same CAB operation (VARNISH & CAB)

How do I ensure that when I validate “YES” it goes to the VARNISH step and “NO” to the CAB step

Thank you in advance for your help

Best regards

entry.title: Create button is Greyed-out in Manage incidents > People Tab for creating Business Partner
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am encountering an issue with the "Manage Incidents" app. When I try to add an injured person in the "People" tab, the "Create" button is greyed out and I am unable to proceed with adding the injured person details. This issue arises even when I add the injured person at the time of reporting the incident using the "Report Incident" app.

Has anyone else faced this issue? How can I activate the "Create" button in the "People" tab to add an injured person? Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Added Screenshot For you reference

 

SAP Environment, Health, and Safety Management , SAP S/4HANA business partner SAP EHS Safety Issue  PLM (Product Lifecycle Management)  #

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hello,

Original question: I could read in the article that it is possible to remove tag mappings with competencies via Integration Center. Can you please let me know how to do it?

I am sorry, I found it: The import overwrites the assigned tags. If you want no assigned tags, you just put it empty.

Martin Pösinger

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi. David

I'm Ninh from VietNam. I'm interested in SAP and would like to learn it. Thanks for your program

entry.title: Re: Authority Check-For Cost Center Based on User name
entry.content:
Hello 

First of all, you should check the cost center is reachable at this exit.  If yes, then you must fill lv_cs by cost center  that pass to exit.

SELECT count(*)
  FROM z_cs_auth
  WHERE uname = @SY-uname AND kostl = @iv_kostl."iv_kostl is cost center that reachabel form exit.
IF sy-subrc is not INITIAL.
  " No entries found for the user in the custom table
  MESSAGE e001(zuser_auth).
  EXIT.
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Activate Open Item Management for G/L Accounts
entry.content:
Hello,

Have you read the following SAP Help Portal document?

Activate Open Item Management: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/c8d4d165bdd24fbf9adf0a061966c19a.html?locale=en-US

I will also forward your question to the experts.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Vulnerability report of Crystal Reports for Visual St...
entry.content:
Here's the response from R&D, from the looks of her response they have all been looked at and none of API's  are used by CR or not relevant:

 

Package

Version

Modules

Severity

Vulnerabilities

libicu

3.0

crdb_p2ssyb10.dll, icuin30.dll,  keydecoder.dll

critical

CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484

CVE-2015-5922 Crystal reports is not supported on Apple OSX. so not impacted by this

CVE-2016-6293 we don't use uloc_acceptLanguageFromHTTP . so not impacted by this

CVE-2017-17484 we don't use function ucnv_UTF8FromUTF8

 

libicu

3.0

crdb_p2ssyb10.dll, icuin30.dll,  keydecoder.dll

high

CVE-2011-4599, CVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10532

CVE-2011-4599  we don't use _canonicalize function. so we are not impacted by this

CVE-2014-7923  we don't use this TP in chrome. So we are not impacted by this

CVE-2014-7926  we don't use this TP in chrome. So we are not impacted by this

CVE-2014-8146  we don't use resolveImplicitLevels  function. So Not impacted by this.

CVE-2014-8147  we don't use resolveImplicitLevels  function. So Not impacted by this.

CVE-2015-5922 Crystal reports is not supported on Apple OSX. so not impacted by this

CVE-2016-6293 we don't use uloc_acceptLanguageFromHTTP . so not impacted by this

CVE-2017-17484 we don't use function ucnv_UTF8FromUTF8

CVE-2017-7867  we don't use utf8TextAccess function so we are not impacted by this CVE

CVE-2017-7868  we don't use utf8TextAccess function so we are not impacted by this CVE

CVE-2020-10531  we don't use UnicodeString::doAppend(). So not impacted by this

CVE-2020-10532  is it a typo? Icu only has CVE CVE-2020-10531.

libicu

3.4

icuuc30.dll

critical

CVE-2014-9654, CVE-2014-9911, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484

CVE-2015-5922 Crystal reports is not supported on Apple OSX. so not impacted by this

CVE-2014-9911 we are not using ures_getByKeyWithFallback . so not impacted by this

CVE-2014-9654 we are not using this component in Chrome. So not impacted by this

CVE-2016-6293 we don't use function uloc_acceptLanguageFromHTTP

CVE-2017-17484 we don't use function ucnv_UTF8FromUTF8

 

libicu

3.4

icuuc30.dll

high

CVE-2011-4599, CVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10531

Duplicated CVEs with icuin30.dll

libicu

4.4

icuin42.dll

critical

CVE-2014-9911, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2017-14952, CVE-2017-17484

CVE-2014-9911 we are not using ures_getByKeyWithFallback . so not impacted by this

CVE-2015-5922 Crystal reports is not supported on Apple OSX. so not impacted by this

CVE-2017-14952 we don't use function ZoneMeta::createMetazoneMappings in file icu/i18n/zonemeta.cpp

CVE-2017-17484 we don't use function ucnv_UTF8FromUTF8

 

libicu

4.4

icuin42.dll

high

CVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10531

Duplicated CVEs with icuuc30.dll

libicu

4.2.1

icuuc42.dll, icudt42.dll

critical

CVE-2014-9911, CVE-2015-5922, CVE-2016-6293, CVE-2017-17484

Duplicated CVEs with above

libicu

4.2.1

icuuc42.dll, icudt42.dll

high

CVE-2011-4599, CVE-2014-7923, CVE-2014-7926, CVE-2014-8146, CVE-2014-8147, CVE-2017-7867, CVE-2017-7868, CVE-2020-10531

Duplicated CVEs with above

libjpeg

9a

cslibu-3-0.dll

high

CVE-2020-14153 

 False Alarm. We are using jpeg 9d instead of 9a

libtiff

4.5.1

cslibu-3-0.dll

high

CVE-2023-52355

no impact. TIFFRasterScanlineSize64 is not used in crystal reports.

openssl

1.0.2f

sapcrypto.dll

critical

CVE-2016-2177, CVE-2022-1292, CVE-2022-2068

These are transitive dependency and  main tp has been taken care of all the mitigation of this

openssl

1.0.2f

sapcrypto.dll

high

CVE-2016-8610, CVE-2022-0778, CVE-2023-0215, CVE-2023-0464

These are transitive dependency and  main tp has been taken care of all the mitigation of this

zlib

1.2.12

boezlib.dll, zlib.dll

critical

CVE-2022-37434, CVE-2023-45853

CVE-2022-37434 We don't call function inflateGetHeader ()

CVE-2023-45853 We don’t use affected function zipOpenNewFileInZip4_64()

entry.title: (69) controleer valuta can Items bij ITem Cost
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm getting this error message - (69) Controleer Valuta can Items bij ITem Cost when trying to add an A/P Invoice copied from Goods Receipt PO with a discount. How do I fix this?

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud Explained: A Video Guide for Business Users
entry.content:
Abstract

Whether you're a stakeholder, manager, consultant, or business user of SAP Commerce Cloud, you will need clear, concise, and insightful information. To help you navigate the extensive functionalities of SAP Commerce Cloud, the Commerce education/training team curated a series of videos that cover every module you might need. All these videos are inside the Business End User SAP Commerce Cloud channel. This blog post serves as your ultimate guide and index to these invaluable resources. Get ready to transform your e-commerce capabilities and drive business success!

This blog post can also serve as a foundational self-study resource to enhance your preparation for the SAP Commerce Cloud Business User Certification exam. It covers most of the pertinent topics and provides a first-level introduction to them. However, for a more comprehensive learning experience, I strongly recommend enrolling in the SAP Commerce Cloud Business User C4H320 training. This program offers direct instruction from SAP-authorized instructors who will guide and support you throughout your learning journey.

(Please be aware that some videos referenced in this guide may display user interfaces (UIs) or storefronts with minor differences compared to the latest version of SAP Commerce Cloud. Due to the rapid pace of monthly updates, it can be challenging to ensure all videos reflect the most current version. However, the features and functionalities should remain consistent, and you can safely disregard the UI or storefront differences.)

Overview

First, please watch the video titled:

Introduction to SAP Commerce Cloud

to get a brief overview of the basics of SAP’s powerful e-commerce solution.

As explained in the video, SAP Commerce Cloud is composed of a number of key modules. The most essential ones are illustrated in the following diagram:

(From Bottom to Top)

  • Platform - The Platform module serves as the foundational layer providing core functionalities such as user management, security, scalability, and cloud deployment. It is designed to support customizable and scalable e-commerce solutions.
  • Product Content Management (PCM) - PCM is a critical module for managing product information across all sales channels. It allows businesses to centralize product data, ensuring consistency, accuracy, and enrichment of product details.
  • Commerce (Promotions & Coupons, Search, etc.) - This module focuses on key commerce functionalities such as Promotions & Coupons, Search & Navigation, Adaptive Search, etc.
  • Customer Experience Management (aka. Web Content Management) - this module helps manage and deliver digital content to various customer touchpoints. It includes tools for content creation, personalization, and management, all aimed at enhancing user experiences.
  • Order Management - This module handles the full lifecycle of customer orders. This includes order capture, processing, fulfillment, and returns management.
  • Customer Support - This module empowers customer service teams with tools to manage customer inquiries, complaints, and service requests effectively.
  • B2B - Specifically designed for Business-to-Business commerce scenarios, the B2B module extends the functionalities of all the other modules and includes B2B driven features such as account management, self-service organizational structures, replenishment ordering, customized pricing, and approval workflows.
  • UIs (Storefronts, Backoffice, SmartEdit) - refers to all the user interfaces employed for interacting with various types of data of all the underlying modules.

For a quick overview of the Platform module, feel free to watch the Platform & Extensibility video.

Following that, we will delve into each of the other modules, introducing: 1. Backoffice UIs, the primary tools of business users; 2. PCM for product data management; 3. Customer Experience Management to present the e-commerce shop with product data; 4. Commerce for promotions, coupons and search to enhance the e-commerce shop; 5. Order Management & Customer Support for order fulfillment and the related customer support features; 6. B2B for a quick overview of B2B features.

1. Backoffice UIs

Among the various graphical user interfaces available out-of-the-box in SAP Commerce Cloud, Backoffice is undoubtedly the most frequently used by business users.

Backoffice offers several standard perspectives (aka. cockpits) tailored to different user roles and feature sets. To get an overview of these perspectives, you can watch the video:

Backoffice Perspectives

One notable perspective is the Backoffice Administration cockpit. This perspective is versatile and can be used to manage various types of data. Let's take a closer look at how to manage system data within the Backoffice Administration Cockpit:

Managing System Data in Backoffice Administration Cockpit

In addition, Backoffice includes many useful general features as well, such as:

Deep Linking in Backoffice

For the other use of Backoffice (e.g., Product Cockpit, Adaptive Search Cockpit, etc.), please refer to the corresponding Backoffice perspectives in the modules listed below.

2. Product Content Management (PCM)

For business users, a typical first task within the context of Product Content Management (PCM) in SAP Commerce Cloud is to become familiar with the Backoffice Product Cockpit. To get started quickly, you can watch an introductory video:

Backoffice Product Cockpit

Now, let's delve into the specific steps required to perform essential PCM tasks in Backoffice using the Product Cockpit:

  1. Create a Product Category
  2. Add a Product to a Category
  3. Insert New Products Using Excel
  4. Filter the Product Catalog Using the Welcome Dashboard
  5. Approve a Product Using the Welcome Dashboard
  6. Compare Products in the Backoffice Product Cockpit
  7. Bulk Approve and Bulk Edit Products
  8. Bulk Edit Products Using Excel Export / Import
  9. Synchronize a Product or Catalog  

Additionally, media management is a crucial aspect of Product Content Management. To learn how to add media to products within the Product Cockpit, watch the following instructional videos:

  1. Add Media to a Product
  2. Uploading Media to Backoffice Product Cockpit Using Excel

After watching the videos, you should now have a solid understanding of how to manage basic product data in SAP Commerce Cloud. In addition to these fundamentals, SAP Commerce Cloud offers several standard product modeling approaches to extend the basic product model. For an overview, please watch this video:

Product Modeling (Overview)

For a more in-depth look into specific product modeling approaches, consider exploring the following resources:

  • Identifying the Basic Product Variants
  • An Introduction to Configurable Products
  • Introducing New Features for Product Configuration

Lastly, it's important to note that for product content management in the Backoffice, the workflow management support in the collaboration center is an invaluable tool. For more information, please watch the corresponding video:

Working with Workflows

Please note that workflows can also be used to collaboratively manage data from other modules. You will see examples of this later.

3. Customer Experience Management (aka. Web Content Management)

After preparing the product data, we'll need to present it on an e-commerce shop. This is achieved using a Web Content Management System (WCMS) in the Customer Experience Management module. Check out this video for an overview of WCMS and to understand how backend data integrates with the frontend:

An overview of Web Content Management System

The standard frontend solution in SAP Commerce Cloud is known as Composable Storefront. Watch this video for a quick introduction:

Introducing SAP Commerce Cloud Composable Storefront

For easy and intuitive management of frontends and related web content, SmartEdit is provided. Start with this video, Experience and Web Content Management in SmartEdit for a quick introduction to SmartEdit. Afterward, you can delve into the following videos for more detailed information on working with SmartEdit:

  • Create a Static Page
  • Add a Component to a Page
  • Add a Component to a Shared Content Slot
  • Edit a Category Page
  • Creating User-Friendly URLs with SmartEdit
  • Clone a Page
  • Remove, Delete and Restore a Page
  • Content Versioning in SmartEdit
  • Extending your Website Structure with Navigation Management
  • Add a New Navigation Node

In addition, Personalization is a crucial aspect of customer experience management. To see how to add personalization to an existing page, you can watch the video "Add a Personalization to a Page." This feature is available in SmartEdit's personalization mode. For a brief introduction to this mode, view "Personalizing Your Commerce Storefront in SmartEdit".

Finally, as mentioned earlier, workflows can be used for collaboration work within SAP Commerce Cloud. To understand how to effectively use workflows in SmartEdit, you can watch the video Working with Workflows in SmartEdit.

4. Commerce (Module)

Now that our e-commerce shop is set up with product data, it's time to enhance it using the Commerce module.

1. Among the many features provided in this module, promotions are definitely the first ones to explore. For a quick overview, check out this video: Working with Promotion Engine in Backoffice (Overview).

Once you've watched the video, you can delve deeper into the specifics of working with promotions in Backoffice through the following topics:

  • Creating a Promotion Rule Based on a Template
  • Creating a New Promotion Rule
  • Examining a Promotion Rule in Backoffice

You can also personalize promotions through Commerce Customization. For a quick demonstration, check out the Create a Commerce Customization video.

2. The next significant topic is the creation and management of coupons. You can watch the following videos to learn how to create coupons and apply them with promotions:

  • Creating a Single-Code Coupon
  • Creating a Multi-Code Coupon
  • Creating a Coupon-Based Promotion

Additionally, there are special kinds of coupons designed for specific business requirements. For a quick introduction to an advanced coupon example, you can watch the Customer Coupons video.

3. To further enhance user experience, optimizing search functionalities is crucial. While the Search & Navigation module can be configured to enhance search capabilities, it requires a more technical approach. On the other hand, Adaptive Search can be utilized by business users to manage, optimize, and create more meaningful search experiences. For a quick summary, refer to the Overview of Adaptive Search Perspective.

For detailed guidance on actions you can perform within the adaptive search cockpit in Backoffice, please watch the following tutorials:

  • Boosting a Single Item
  • Boost Multiple Items via Boost Rules
  • Adding a New Facet to the Storefront
  • Promoting a Facet in Adaptive Search
  • Excluding a Facet in Adaptive Search

Lastly, understanding the basics of Merging Search Profiles is essential. This knowledge will help you unify and refine search configurations for an optimal user experience.

5. Order Management & Customer Support

After a customer visits an e-commerce shop, searches for their favorite products, and adds them to the shopping cart alongside any applicable promotions or coupons, they place an order to initiate the order fulfillment process. To understand the entire lifecycle from order capture to fulfillment, please watch the "Fulfilling Orders" video.

In addition, customer support is crucial to ensuring customer satisfaction before, during, and even after the shopping process. Please watch this video:

Improving your Customer Service with Backoffice Customer Support (Overview)

for an overview of the customer support features.

As you see, customer support is provided through two graphical user interfaces: the Customer Support Cockpit in Backoffice and the Assisted Service Mode (ASM).

You can perform a variety of customer support activities in the Customer Support Cockpit in Backoffice, such as: Creating a New Customer Account in the Backoffice Customer Support Cockpit. However, ASM offers a more modern and intuitive approach, making it particularly appealing for business users. Please watch the video:

Improving the User Experience with the ASM (Overview)

to get an overview of ASM, and review the following videos to learn some essential actions you can perform with ASM:

  • Creating a New Customer via ASM
  • Access Customer Data in ASM
  • Give or Withdraw Consent on a Customer's Behalf in ASM
  • How to Place an Order for a Calling Customer (ASM)

6. B2B

The Business-to-Business (B2B) commerce module of SAP Commerce Cloud is specifically designed to support and enhance the complexities and intricacies involved in B2B commerce transactions. These could include bulk orders, complex pricing models, order approval processes, or highly specific delivery requirements unique to B2B interactions. You can check the webcast recording of

Leveraging SAP Commerce Cloud for B2B Customers

to get a detailed overview of the B2B commerce module.

You may also find it useful to watch the following videos:

  • Replenishment and Scheduled Orders (B2B)
  • Approving Orders (B2B)

These provide basic demo examples of standard B2B support.

Last but not least

I hope this structured guide, complete with references to our carefully curated video content, provides you with a concise overview of the immense potential of SAP Commerce Cloud.

Don't forget to subscribe to the channel of Business End User SAP Commerce Cloud for the latest updates:

or leave your comments or questions here.

Happy learning!

entry.title: Partial scrap confirmation in DM, Quantity Confirmation, WC POD
entry.content:
Dear DM Experts,

We have a customer requirement to have a similar quantity confirmation possiblity for the discrete manufacturing in DM like we already have in S/4HANA. 

The question is how can I do a partial scrap confirmation in DM? What are the procedure, where I can say I have a defect and from total 5 product I can produce only 4. In S/4HANA I can simply type in yield quantity 4 and scrap 1. 

However in DM I can scrap the whole SFC only. Or I need to split the SFC first to 1 piece and 4 pieces and scrap the SFC belongs to the product, which has defect. (or I am missing something and I could type in somewhere, scrap = 1)

On the Order POD there is a Plugin "Quantity Confirmation", which seems to be exactly what we would like to have for a Work Center POD. Does anybody know, why this Plugin isn't available for the Work Center POD?

What is the best way to handle the above mentioned simple scenario, where there are all together 5 products, and during the production 1 piece must be marked as scrap from the 5? Is that only possible using the splitting functionality in DM or is there a better way?

Thank you for the help in advance.

Regards,
Oliver

entry.title: Is Scheduling publication for stories based on DWC connection now supported?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am wonder if in SAP Analytics Cloud (Version 2024.8.20) scheduling publication for stories based on DWC connection is now supported?

Regards,

Karo

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CHANGE
entry.content: The previous value 'L' in the EKPO-LOEKZ field. I am waiting for this field to be deleted with the code I wrote. So i am expecting the field empty. Thanks for answering by the way.

entry.title: Re: In-House Repair in S/4HANA Service - Start with an Overview
entry.content: Hi, @Udo , As per the comments above, "Logistic status: Received at Repair Center" is triggered when 1. GI is complete 2. Inspection - with follow-up activity 0027 is complete. I am trying to perform inspection with activity 0027 but it is giving me an error that "Continue In-House Repair (Service) is valid only for non-valuated stock. Can you please suggest how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP BO 4.2 SP05: Windows Server OS Upgrade From 2008...
entry.content:
Hi.

You can't upgrade directly from 2008 to 2016; you would need to upgrade to 2012 first and then from there to 2016.

With that said, doing an in-place OS upgrade of a BO server is not recommended.  See this note and this one.  The recommended solution is to build a new server, then do a fresh install of the OS and the BO software.  

With that said, BI4.2 is now out of support, you should consider BI4.3 if you can.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse
entry.content: Good to hear!

entry.title: Re: Vulnerability report of Crystal Reports for Visual St...
entry.content:
You would need to create an app that shows the CVE's being used by CR API's and how it could be affected in the app.

The only way to get a support contract now is to purchase Crystal Reports Server, you get a 1 year contract with it.

It's about $1000, but also can add a huge amount of functionality to your project, note you will need to convert how you open reports, relatively easy to do.

More info here:

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/crystal-server.html

See my reply with R&D's response.

entry.title: OnInit Rules for Onboarding Pages
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

We are looking for an option to exempt Oninit rule for onboardee's, the business want to default the business email format and primary flag but this shouldn't be applicable for onboardees, we tried with permission group as well that didn't work for is there a way to overcome this issue.

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards

D

entry.title: End User Experience monitoring with SAP GUI for private cloud only from backend ?
entry.content:
Hello,

We want to monitor with CALM, on a private cloud solution, all end user activities through Fiori or the SAPGUI. 

With Fiori we can monitor from the frontend but it seems not for SAPGUI, only from the backend.

Is there a solution to monitor SAPGUI like Fiori from the frontend ?

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Error while Generating GSTR1 reports in S4Hana public cloud
entry.content: Hello,

entry.title: Re: Error while Generating GSTR1 reports in S4Hana public cloud
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question.

entry.title: Re: Error while Generating GSTR1 reports in S4Hana public...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Have you followed the setup instructions described in the following SAP Help Portal document?

Setting Up Electronic Document Data for the GSTR1 Report: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/b6e67daefce840a2aafeb87787a60f7a.html?locale=en-US

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing - subscribe to MQTT topics
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to subscribe to a MQTT topic in SAP Digital Manufacturing. The MQTT broker runs on the same machine as the SAP Production Connector. The process is as follows: A OPC UA server publishes events and alarms which are consumed by a Node-RED flow which further publishes the message as JSON to a Mosquitto MQTT broker and topic.

The problem now is that I am not able to connect to the MQTT broker from SAP Digital Manufacturing via Production Connector because I would have to upload a "Client Certificate" consisting of a private key, client certificate, CA certificate and root certificate in the .pem format according to SAP Help Portal. I've done that and also integrated the client key and all certificates into one .pem file. After uploading the certificate chain as single file into SAP Digital Manufacturing in the app "Manage Message Brokers", Section 3rd Party Brokers and Production Connectors, I receive the following error:

Couldn't upload Production Connector client certificate. Response: An error occurred while processing your request.

Any ideas how to further proceed here?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards
Fabian

entry.title: A Magical First
entry.content:
There is magic in first times. The novelty of those moments makes up for most of our core memories. Most people have vivid memories of their first day in school or their first/childhood friend, their first job and their first day at that job or their first pet, among others… These are moments outside the wheel of repetitive days. Alexandra Hofmann, a cloud solution architect at SAP’s Corporate Processes and Information Technology (CPIT), is no stranger to firsts: Despite the scale of the global juggernaut that SAP Sapphire is, it was an ocean that Alexandra was comfortable sailing in; she had her first presentation at SAP Sapphire in Orlando, in June 2024. 

Alexandra Hofmann

“My first time presenting at SAP Sapphire was a fantastic opportunity to experience how and what SAP communicates to our customers and partners, and how all products and topics are linked. For me, it was a great learning opportunity to present in front of many people, not only for my career but also for my personal development,” says Alexandra. 

Alexandra started at SAP in 2013 as part of SAP’s dual studies program. Studying internal business administration and information technology and working in different departments in her practical phases prepared her well for her start within the Platform Center of Excellence team in 2016. Since then, Alexandra has been an invaluable part of the team which defines SAP’s internal IT strategy for cloud development within CPIT, starting off as a developer on SAP Business Technology Platform for the Neo environment, conducting HTML5 & Java trainings, designing the architecture of the customer data hub tool, and now focusing on enabling CPIT colleagues through SAP IT cloud developer enablement programs.  

Shortly after the SAP Sapphire event, another first came knocking on her door: Alexandra has since delivered two expert sessions on the Inside SAP YouTube series. In Alexandra’s first session she explained how we run SAP Business Technology Platform at scale, utilizing AI capabilities and agile methodologies to optimize operations, increase developer efficiency, and accelerate innovation as a large-scale enterprise. In the ‘Discover How SAP Accelerates Business Using SAP Build Solutions’ session, viewers experienced how SAP’s internal IT team builds apps without writing code, using AI-driven code-development support, automating workflow processes, and designing central business sites unleashing the power of SAP Build solutions. 

Alexandra Hofmann delivering a presentation at SAP Sapphire in Orlando in June 2024.

“Holding the presentation at SAP Sapphire in front of customers and partners was the best way to prepare for the YouTube sessions as the direct feedback afterwards showed how important SAP runs SAP stories are,” says Alexandra. 

“Our unit and our SAP runs SAP scenarios serve as frontrunners for our customers on using SAP Business Technology Platform. This is based on our experiences and learnings. Customers can leverage our lessons and apply them to their own cloud setup,” she adds. 

Her webcast was preceded by the opening session with Oliver Gutzeit and Christian Freytag’s session on SAP’s cloud business journey’s impact on our Enterprise Architecture. The upcoming sessions will serve interesting insights into AI, about our AI offerings in SAP IT and how we infuse our core business processes with AI, for example, in our HR (Human Resource) area.  

“I would definitely do it again because, in my opinion, we as well as our customers and partners can learn a lot from each other, and this offers a platform for great exchange opportunities,” says Alexandra. 

 Indeed, a first to remember!

entry.title: Re: Create DataType and Message Type artifact in Cloud Integration capability of SAP Integration Sui
entry.content:
Hi @christian_riesener2 ,

Thank you for the positive feedback. Glad that you experienced the functionality and liked it. And to answer your query about delete functionality, it is not yet available . The deletion of the rows/nodes will be released by mid/end of Sep 2024.

Currently the xsd is only read-only as it is in SAP PI/PO ESR. Incase you find it helpful to make it(XSD) editable, please create an improvement request via SAP Customer Influence program.

Regards,

Radhika

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 is now available. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is based on the technical product SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

To access the Final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

For further formats and languages of the What's New information, as well as pre-filtered views, please use the following SAP S/4HANA Cloud Help Portal page.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access the Product Assistance in multiple languages.

For you as a customers, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

There is a new commenting feature available for the What’s New in the release SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408. The feature is now available for this release as part of a pilot that will end on August 21, 2024. During the pilot, authors will evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. 

To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Re: Workbook for users to lock data (version and year)
entry.content:
I got around to it for the simple version.

Also, wy is it not possible to delete your own posts, seems weird.

entry.title: Re: UFL .Net para Crystal Reports 2020
entry.content: Hello Don, thanks for responding, the version I put in the crw64.config is 4.6.2 and the UFL dll project was compiled to x64 under this framerwork, at this moment I just want to use this UFL in the crystal designer, to see its behavior . and check if some formulas change their syntax or something like that, we want to validate how crystal 2020 is working and what differences we find at least in design or in the assembly of formulas, UFL's Etc. with respect to crsytal 8.5, I am currently working on a test version , to make this comparison. I already did these steps of this KB1525014 and it still doesn't show the UFL in the crystal formulas, is there any additional settings to see it in the crystal designer?

entry.title: Re: How to communicate the value of Enterprise Architecture in SAP projects
entry.content:
Hi @BillyGee 

I feel the same and this very much reminds me of the metaphor used by Gregor Hohpe in "The Software Architect Elevator" (brilliant read if you haven't read that yet) of how each organisation has their own "map" of how the "world" looks like and what is in the center of said "map". So of course most SAP SIs place SAP in the center, which might not work well in all instances with the customers own "map" in mind.

And in the same way I think industry-standards can more often than not be more beneficial than proprietary frameworks / accelerators that each SI brings to the table.

Best,

Toni

entry.title: SAP PI/PO Body filter the data in Message Mapping only
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to set conditional filtering data on the BODY in Message Mapping to send the data that meets the conditions to a third-party system.But once I've configured it, I'm testing to only map the first piece of data.

I didn't see any difference when I compared it with other interfaces. Is it possible that the other party's interface is causing it?Here's a screenshot of my configuration and testing.

Please support . Thanks.
